content.scenarioHint: 你的朋友今天穿了一套新衣服，你想要自然地赞美他的穿搭，同时表达出你的真实欣赏
content.speakerText: What do you think of my outfit today?
content.speakerTextCn: 你觉得我今天这身衣服怎么样？
expectedAnswers: You look amazing—those colors really pop on you!
That style suits you perfectly! Where did you get it?
Wow, you always know how to turn heads!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了对对方穿搭的赞美
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确自然
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常夸赞的语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'style', 'look', 'suit', 'pop' 等相关关键词

content.speakerText: I wore this outfit for the first time today—how do I look?
content.speakerTextCn: 我今天第一次穿这套衣服，我看起来怎么样？
expectedAnswers: You look so put together—like you just stepped out of a magazine!
The fit is perfect and the colors go so well together!
You’re killing it! That’s a head-to-toe win.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否完整回应了对整体穿搭的询问
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：使用了自然的口语表达和比喻
关键词覆盖：是否使用了至少两个场景关键词如 fit, colors, put together, killing it
